sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71842" key="cu/silos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξύσῐλος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῡ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">shaven, smooth,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0524.tlg001:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sophr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
